data.en: I have just received a letter from my brother, Tim.
data.cn: 我刚刚收到弟弟蒂姆的来信。
data.hint: have just received 表示刚刚收到，现在完成时；from 引导来源。
accept: I've just received a letter from my brother, Tim.

data.en: He has already visited a great number of different places in Australia.
data.cn: 他已经去过澳大利亚的不少地方了。
data.hint: already 已，常用于肯定句；a great number of 修饰复数名词 places。

data.en: He has just bought an Australian car and has gone to Alice Springs.
data.cn: 他刚买了一辆澳大利亚小汽车，现在去了艾利斯斯普林斯。
data.hint: has gone to 表示去了某地还没回来；and 连接两个并列的现在完成时动作。

data.en: From there, he will fly to Perth.
data.hint: will fly to 将飞往，一般将来时；From there 从那里。
accept: He will fly to Perth from there.

data.en: My brother has never been abroad before.
data.cn: 我弟弟以前从未出过国。
data.hint: has never been abroad before 以前从未出国，never 与 before 连用表示“从未”。

data.en: He has been there for six months.
data.cn: 他在那儿已经住了6个月了。
data.hint: for + 一段时间，与现在完成时的延续性动词连用。

data.en: Tim is working for a big firm.
data.cn: 蒂姆正在为一家大公司工作。
data.hint: is working 正在工作，现在进行时；work for 为...工作。

data.en: He is finding this trip very exciting.
data.cn: 他觉得这次旅行非常激动人心。
data.hint: find sth. + adj. 觉得某事如何；exciting 令人兴奋的。

data.en: Alice Springs is a small town in the centre of Australia.
data.cn: 艾利斯斯普林斯是澳大利亚中部的一个小镇。
data.hint: in the centre of 在...中部；Alice Springs 专有名词。

data.en: He will soon visit Darwin.
data.cn: 他不久还将到达尔文去。
data.hint: will soon visit 不久将拜访，will + 动词原形；soon 副词修饰动词。
accept: Soon he will visit Darwin.

data.en: I have had breakfast.
data.hint: have had breakfast 现在完成时，have 是助动词，had 是 eat 的过去分词形式。
accept: I've had breakfast.

data.en: He has been in prison for six months.
data.hint: be in prison 坐牢；for six months 达六个月，作时间状语。

data.en: The police have not caught the thief yet.
data.cn: 警察还没有捉到小偷呢。
data.hint: police 作主语看作复数；yet 用于否定句句尾表示“还（没）”。
accept: The police haven't caught the thief yet.

data.en: You have already asked that question three times.
data.cn: 你已经把那个问题问了三遍了。
data.hint: already 用于肯定句；three times 三次。
accept: You've already asked that question three times.

data.en: Have you ever been to Switzerland?
data.hint: Have you ever been to... 你曾去过某地吗？ Switzerland 瑞士。

data.en: I have never been to Switzerland.
data.hint: have never been to 表示从未去过某地；never 表示从不。
accept: I've never been to Switzerland.

data.en: He has broken two records so far.
data.cn: 至今他已经打破了两项纪录。
data.hint: so far 至今，常与现在完成时连用；broken 是 break 的过去分词。
accept: So far he has broken two records.

data.en: I haven't seen George lately.
data.hint: lately 最近，常用于否定句和疑问句；haven't seen 没看见。
accept: I have not seen George lately.

data.en: The train has not arrived yet.
data.hint: has not arrived 现在完成时的否定式；yet 句尾表示“还”。
accept: The train hasn't arrived yet.

data.en: Have you read any good books lately?
data.cn: 你最近有没有读到好书？
data.hint: Have you read... 疑问句动词用过去分词（读音为 /red/）；any 用于疑问句。

data.en: Why is Tim finding this trip exciting?
data.cn: 为什么蒂姆觉得这次旅行很令人兴奋？
data.hint: Why 疑问代词；find sth. exciting 觉得某事令人兴奋。

data.en: He has retired now.
data.hint: retire 退休，现在完成时表示已经完成的动作并对现在产生影响。

data.en: He is leaving the house.
data.hint: is leaving 现在进行时，表示正在发生的动作或即将发生的动作。

data.en: He has just left the house.
data.hint: has just left 刚刚离开，left 是 leave 的过去分词形式。
accept: He've just left the house.

data.en: He is having breakfast.
data.hint: is having 正在吃（喝/进行），现在进行时形式。

data.en: He has just had breakfast.
data.hint: has just had 刚刚吃过，助动词 has + just + 过去分词 had。
accept: He've just had breakfast.

data.en: She is writing a letter.
data.hint: is writing 正在写，write 变进行时去掉 e 加 ing。

data.en: She has just written a letter.
data.hint: has just written 刚刚写完，written 是 write 的过去分词。
accept: She've just written a letter.

data.en: My sister is turning on the radio.
data.hint: turn on 打开（电器）；radio 收音机。

data.en: My sister has just turned on the radio.
data.cn: 我姐姐刚刚打开了收音机。
data.hint: has just turned on 刚刚打开，turned on 为动词短语的过去分词形式。

data.en: My mother is making the bed.
data.hint: make the bed 整理床铺，现在进行时 is making.

data.en: My mother has just made the bed.
data.cn: 我母亲刚刚整理好了床铺。
data.hint: has just made 刚刚铺好，made 是 make 的过去分词。

data.en: She is buying a new hat.
data.hint: is buying 正在买；hat 帽子。

data.en: She has just bought a new hat.
data.cn: 她刚刚买了一顶新帽子。
data.hint: has just bought 刚刚买好，bought 是 buy 的过去分词。
accept: She've just bought a new hat.

data.en: He is still washing the dishes.
data.hint: still 仍然，常用于进行时；wash the dishes 洗碗。

data.en: He hasn't washed the dishes yet.
data.hint: hasn't washed yet 还没有洗，现在完成时否定式；yet 置于句尾。
accept: He has not washed the dishes yet.

data.en: She is still making the beds.
data.hint: making the beds 整理床铺（复数）。

data.en: She hasn't made the beds yet.
data.hint: hasn't made yet 还没有铺，made 是 make 的过去分词。
accept: She has not made the beds yet.

data.en: He is still combing his hair.
data.hint: comb one's hair 梳头；still 仍然。

data.en: He hasn't combed his hair yet.
data.hint: hasn't combed yet 还没有梳，combed 过去分词中的 b 不发音。
accept: He has not combed his hair yet.

data.en: She is still sweeping the carpet.
data.hint: sweep the carpet 扫地毯；still 作状语。

data.en: She hasn't swept the carpet yet.
data.hint: hasn't swept yet 还没有扫，swept 为 sweep 的过去分词。
accept: She has not swept the carpet yet.

data.en: We are still reading Macbeth.
data.hint: Macbeth 莎士比亚悲剧《麦克白》专有名词；reading 正在读。

data.en: We haven't read Macbeth yet.
data.cn: 我们还没有读《麦克白》呢。
data.hint: haven't read yet 还没有读，read 的过去分词发音为 /red/。
accept: We have not read Macbeth yet.

data.en: Have you seen the new play at The Globe yet?
data.cn: 你去环球剧场看过那出新戏了吗？
data.hint: The Globe 环球剧场；seen 为 see 的过去分词；yet 句末表疑问语气。

data.en: Have you taken your holidays yet?
data.hint: take one's holidays 度假；taken 为 take 的过去分词。

data.en: Have you read this book yet?
data.hint: read this book 读这本书，read 过去分词形式不变但读音改变。

data.en: Have you done your homework yet?
data.hint: do one's homework 做家庭作业；done 为 do 的过去分词。

data.en: Have you finished your work yet?
data.hint: finish one's work 完成工作；finished 过去分词形式。

data.en: Yesterday I received a present from Aunt Jane.
data.cn: 昨天我收到了简姑姑送的一件礼物。
data.hint: Yesterday 过去时间，谓语动词用过去式 received；from 引导来源。
accept: I received a present from Aunt Jane yesterday.
